text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to find a way to bulk up Tamamo Cross,
but simply taking her to a buffet has proven
ineffective at changing her light eating habits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no choice but to prepare food that tastes
incredible. With this in mind, I call upon the two
greatest chefs at Tracen Academy for their
assistance.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okey-dokey! I'll whip up the most buono dish I
can for li'l Tamamo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Just leave it to me! I'll make a dish with such
gentle flavors that every bite will simply melt in
her mouth. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is considered the best in the
academy when it comes to recreating a mother's
cooking, while Hishi Akebono is renowned for
being the best chef at Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My plan is to launch a two-pronged assault on
Tamamo's tastebuds.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Tamtam. I've got a scrumptious little meal
for you. Here comes the choo-choo train!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: This'll taste suuuper buono! ☆ Dosukoi! Dosukoi!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh... Yeah, sure, it looks real delish, all right.
But, uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Am I gettin' pranked here or what?! Why do I got
Mommy Dearest and a sumo wrestler tryin' to
stuff my face?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
'Sides... It don't matter how good the food is—I
can't eat it, period. This isn't about the taste...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's like tryin' to pour a whole bucket of water into
a cup. Ya just can't do it...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tamtam...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so it doesn't matter how delicious the food
is? This is going to be tough...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My plan's a bust... and I'm left with no choice but
to cook up another idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If flavor won't fix this... I'll have to approach the
problem from a different angle.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tamamo. Mind if I sat next to you? There
aren't any other empty seats.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's up, City? You on your lunch break
too? Yeah sure, you can sit here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This Umamusume is Gold City. She's one of
Tamamo Cross's peers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's both a racer in the Twinkle Series and a
model. When I explained the situation at hand,
she agreed to help.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, ya got a lotta food there... You can eat all
that without losin' the model figure?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I can. In fact, if I don't eat this much, I'll lose my
figure.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I can choose what I eat... but I have to make sure I
cover all of the necessary food groups.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I didn't eat enough before my races and
modeling gigs, I'd struggle to get through them.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Really? So the reason you eat is so you can get
through everythin'?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. I believe that fueling my body is part of my
job.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And my body knows it. I think that's why I have
such an appetite.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
How can I do my best on the track and runway if
I'm not in perfect form? I have to eat well to do
well.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
("Eat well to do well," huh? She's right about
that...)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe I don't wanna win hard enough yet. I
gotta want it from deep down inside... Then
maybe...)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Phew... You think that did it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no need to thank me. I just said what I'm
always thinking. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo makes me feel better all the time. And
personally, I'd love to repay the favor with a
race...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I promise I'm gonna start eatin' right. It
might take some time, but I'll get there, bit by
bit.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm not eatin' right 'cause I think I can't. But that mentality just shows I'm not takin' all this seriously enough yet.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: There's some things ya can't do unless ya eat. And I got somethin' that I have to do.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If I don't start eatin' as much as I can, I'll never
beat City or anybody else!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So it's time to chow down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Tamamo Cross's chat with Gold City
has helped her understand the importance of a
proper diet. Her attitude towards meals has
completely changed.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's wonderful to hear you say that, Tamtam! ♪
And don't you worry, there's plenty left over for
seconds!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whaaa?! Where am I s'posed to put all dis food?!
Da pile's bigger than Mount Rokko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With tears in her eyes, Tamamo Cross powers
through her mega-sized meal.
